text: 2238 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «مَا مِنْ حَاجٍّ يَضْحَى مُلَبِّياً حَتَّى تَزُولَ اَلشَّمْسُ إِلاَّ غَابَتْ ذُنُوبُهُ مَعَهَا وَ اَلْحَجُّ وَ اَلْعُمْرَةُ يَنْفِيَانِ اَلْفَقْرَ كَمَا يَنْفِي اَلْكِيرُ خَبَثَ اَلْحَدِيدِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2238 - The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said: "There is no pilgrim who continues reciting the Talbiyah until the sun passes its zenith except that their sins disappear along with it. Hajj and Umrah drive away poverty just as the bellows remove impurities from iron."
